title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: crash bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for crash is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 Release Notes linked from the References section.

fixes.description: [rhel-9] crash: rebase internal gdb version to 16.2

full_text:
An update for crash is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 Release Notes linked from the References section.
